ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 124-123) */,
  "favored" INTEGER /* Whether the Timberwolves were favored (True/False) */,
  "played_as" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "total" REAL /* Total points expected for the game */,
  "timberwolves_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the Timberwolves */,
  "opponent_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the opponent */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type (e.g., Playoffs, Regular Season) */,
  "covered" INTEGER /* Whether the Timberwolves covered the spread (True/False) */,
  "over_under" TEXT /* Whether the game went over or under the total points (Over/Under) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "description_short" TEXT /* Short description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_lines" (
  "betting_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting line */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker providing the line */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "total" REAL /* Total points expected for the game */,
  "timberwolves_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the Timberwolves */,
  "opponent_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the opponent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the betting line was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the betting line (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("betting_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the bookmaker */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the bookmaker */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the game (e.g., Q1, Q2, Final) */,
  "timberwolves_score" INTEGER /* Score of the Timberwolves in the quarter */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent in the quarter */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus_per_minute" REAL /* Plus-minus rating of the player per minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-5) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., Spread, Moneyline, Over/Under) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount wagered on the bet */,
  "odds_format" TEXT /* Format of the odds (e.g., decimal, fractional, moneyline) */,
  "wagered_on" TEXT /* Team or outcome wagered on (e.g., Timberwolves, Over) */,
  "stake" REAL /* Stake of the bet */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., Won, Lost) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_type FOREIGN KEY ("bet_type") REFERENCES bet_types ("bet_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_types" (
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet type */,
  "bet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bet type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the bet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner of the game */,
  "predicted_score_timberwolves" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the Timberwolves */,
  "predicted_score_opponent" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the opponent */,
  "predicted_total" INTEGER /* Predicted total points for the game */,
  "predicted_spread" REAL /* Predicted point spread */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner of the game */,
  "predicted_score_timberwolves" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the Timberwolves */,
  "predicted_score_opponent" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the opponent */,
  "predicted_total" INTEGER /* Predicted total points for the game */,
  "predicted_spread" REAL /* Predicted point spread */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "confidence_level_user" REAL /* Confidence level of the user's prediction (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's experience (1-5) */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
